systemAnalysis.systemImpact: This change is additive and introduces a new, isolated benchmarking module. It has no impact on the existing running system or services. The new module will only be active when explicitly executed.

executionSteps.description: Create the directory `~/projects/system-reports/` to store future benchmark reports.
Create the Python package structure for the new benchmarking module.
Define the Pydantic data model for storing benchmark results.

files.change: Create a new file with a Pydantic `BenchmarkResult` model containing fields: `model_name`, `prompt`, `tokens_per_sec`, `time_to_first_token`, `total_response_time`, and `timestamp`.

executionSteps.description: Create the configuration module for models, prompts, and the API endpoint.

files.change: Create a new file defining lists of `MODELS` and `PROMPTS`, and the `OLLAMA_API_BASE_URL`.

executionSteps.description: Implement the HTTP client to communicate with the Ollama API.

files.change: Create a new file with an `OllamaClient` class that has methods to check API availability (`is_available`) and list models.

executionSteps.description: Create the verification script to ensure all components are set up correctly.

files.change: Create a new bash script that checks for the existence of the `~/projects/system-reports` directory, the created Python files, and verifies connectivity to the Ollama API using the new client.
